title: Spatial distribution of organics in the Horsehead nebula: signposts of chemistry driven by atomic carbon
comment: 21 pages, 4 tables, 10 figures; Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: (Abridged) Complex organic molecules (COMs) are considered essential precursors to prebiotic species. While COMs were once expected to be efficiently destroyed under UV-irradiated conditions, detections in photodissociation regions (PDRs) have challenged this view. However, the mechanisms by which UV radiation contributes to their formation are still uncertain. Here, we present moderately resolved maps of simple and complex organic molecules at the UV-illuminated edge of the Horsehead nebula, obtained by combining ALMA and IRAM 30m single-dish observations at $\sim 15^{\prime\prime}$ resolution. We analyze the spatial distribution of species such as C$^{17}$O, CH$_2$CO, CH$_3$CHO, HNCO, CH$_3$CN, and HC$_3$N. By incorporating previous C$^{17}$O and C$^{18}$O single-dish data as well as PdBI maps of H$_2$CO and CH$_3$OH, we derive profiles of gas density, temperature, thermal pressure, and column densities of the organic species as a function of distance from the UV source. Our results show that most organic species$-$particularly H$_2$CO, CH$_2$CO, CH$_3$CHO, HNCO, and CH$_3$CN$-$exhibit enhanced column densities at the UV-illuminated edge compared to cloud interiors, possibly indicating efficient dust-grain surface chemistry driven by the diffusion of atomic C and radicals produced via photodissociation of CO and CH$_3$OH, as supported by recent laboratory experiments. The exceptions, HC$_3$N and CH$_3$OH, can be attributed to inefficient formation on dust grains and ineffective non-thermal desorption into the gas phase, respectively. Additionally, contributions from gas-phase hydrocarbon photochemistry$-$possibly seeded by grain-surface products$-$cannot be ruled out. Further chemical modeling is needed to confirm the efficiency of these pathways for the studied species, which could have important implications for other cold, UV-irradiated environments such as protoplanetary disks.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过ALMA和IRAM观测马头星云UV照射边缘，发现多种复杂有机分子在紫外辐射区域丰度增强，挑战了传统认为UV会破坏有机分子的观点，表明UV可能促进表面化学反应。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为复杂有机分子在紫外辐射条件下会被破坏，但在光解离区域的检测挑战了这一观点。研究旨在探索UV辐射如何促进复杂有机分子的形成机制。
AI.method: 结合ALMA和IRAM 30m单天线观测，获得马头星云UV照射边缘约15角秒分辨率的分子分布图。分析C17O、CH2CO、CH3CHO、HNCO、CH3CN、HC3N等分子的空间分布，结合先前数据推导气体密度、温度、热压和柱密度随UV源距离的变化。
AI.result: 大多数有机分子（特别是H2CO、CH2CO、CH3CHO、HNCO和CH3CN）在UV照射边缘的柱密度比云内部更高，表明光解离产生的原子C和自由基可能驱动有效的尘埃表面化学反应。HC3N和CH3OH是例外，分别归因于尘埃表面形成效率低和非热脱附无效。
AI.conclusion: UV辐射可能通过光解离产生的原子和自由基促进尘埃表面化学反应，从而增强复杂有机分子的形成。这一发现对原行星盘等其他冷UV照射环境有重要启示，需要进一步化学建模验证这些途径的效率。

title: How well is the local Large Scale Structure of the Universe known? CosmicFlows vs. Biteau's Galaxy Catalog with Cloning
summary: Knowledge of the actual density distribution of matter in the local universe is needed for a variety of purposes -- for instance, as a baseline model for ultrahigh energy cosmic ray sources in the continuum limit and for predicting the diffuse Dark Matter annihilation signal. Determining the local mass density and velocity distribution is the aim of the CosmicFlows project. An alternate approach is based on catalogs of galaxies, supplemented with some scheme for filling in for unseen galaxies. Here, we compare the density field proposed by Biteau (2021) with the quasi-linear density field of CosmicFlows2 (Hoffman et al. 2018) and the mean posterior field of CosmicFlows4 (Valade 2026). We find factor-two level differences in some regions and even greater in regions toward the Galactic center zone of avoidance (ZoA) (|l| < 30°, |b| < 20°) as filled by Biteau using "cloning". Within 11 Mpc the density field is well-determined by the Local Volume catalog (Karachentsev et al. 2018) which Biteau directly incorporates; at larger distances, Biteau (2021) should not be used in the ZoA where "galaxies" are entirely fictitious but otherwise is to be preferred over CosmicFlows emphasizing the direction and integrated mass of structures; the radial distribution of mass in Biteau (2021) is less robust due to line-of-sight peculiar velocities. The angular positions of structures in CosmicFlows are sometimes not congruent with evidence in the galaxy catalog.

AI.tldr: 比较Biteau(2021)和CosmicFlows项目的局部宇宙密度场重建方法，发现在银河系中心遮挡区存在显著差异，建议在不同区域使用不同方法
AI.motivation: 局部宇宙物质密度分布的精确知识对于多种天体物理研究至关重要，包括超高能宇宙射线源基准模型和暗物质湮灭信号的预测。需要比较不同方法重建的密度场以评估其可靠性。
AI.method: 比较三种密度场重建方法：1) Biteau(2021)基于星系目录并采用"克隆"方法填补银河系遮挡区；2) CosmicFlows2的准线性密度场；3) CosmicFlows4的平均后验场。重点分析11Mpc内外的差异，特别关注银河系中心遮挡区。
AI.result: 发现不同方法在某些区域存在因子2级别的差异，银河系中心遮挡区(|l|<30°, |b|<20°)差异更大。11Mpc内Local Volume目录提供可靠密度场；更大距离上，Biteau(2021)在遮挡区外优于CosmicFlows，能更好反映结构方向和总质量，但径向质量分布受视线方向特殊速度影响不够稳健。
AI.conclusion: Biteau(2021)方法在银河系遮挡区外优于CosmicFlows，特别适合分析结构方向和总质量；但在遮挡区内因使用虚构星系而不应使用。CosmicFlows的结构角位置有时与星系目录证据不一致。建议根据研究需求选择合适方法。

title: MAJORS II: HCO+& HCN Abundances in W40
summary: We present observations of HCN and HCO$^+$ J = $3 - 2$ in the central $424'' \times 424''$ region of the W40 massive star forming region. The observations were taken as part of a pilot project for the MAJORS large program at the JCMT telescope. By incorporating prior knowledge of N(H$_2$) and $T_K$, assuming a constant density, and using the RADEX radiative transfer code we found that the HCN and HCO$^+$ abundances range from $X$(HCN) = $0.4-7.0 \times 10^{-8}$ and $X$(HCO$^+$) = $0.4-7.3 \times 10^{-9}$. Additional modelling using the NAUTILUS chemical evolution code, that takes H$_2$ density variations into account, however, suggests the HCN and HCO$^+$ abundances may be fairly constant. Careful modelling of three different positions finds $X$(HCN) = $1.3-1.7 \times 10^{-8}$, $X$(HCO$^+$) = $1.3-3.1 \times 10^{-9}$. Cross-comparison of the two models also provides a crude estimate of the gas density producing the HCN and HCO$^+$ emission, with H$_2$ densities in the range $5 \times 10^4 - 5 \times 10^5$ cm$^{-3}$, suggesting that the HCN and HCO$^+$ emission does indeed arise from dense gas. High UV intensity (e.g. $G_o >$ a few thousand) has no effect on the abundances in regions where the visual extinction is large enough to effectively shield the gas from the UV field. In regions where $A_V < 6$, however, the abundance of both species is lowered due to destructive reactions with species that are directly affected by the radiation field.

AI.tldr: 对W40大质量恒星形成区中心区域的HCN和HCO+ J=3-2谱线观测，结合辐射转移和化学演化模型，确定了这两种分子的丰度范围，并估计了产生这些发射的致密气体密度。
AI.motivation: 研究W40大质量恒星形成区中HCN和HCO+分子的丰度分布，了解这些分子示踪剂在恒星形成环境中的化学行为，特别是紫外辐射对分子丰度的影响。
AI.method: 使用JCMT望远镜进行HCN和HCO+ J=3-2谱线观测；结合先验的H2柱密度和气体温度知识，采用RADEX辐射转移代码计算丰度；进一步使用NAUTILUS化学演化代码考虑密度变化进行建模。
AI.result: HCN丰度范围为0.4-7.0×10^-8，HCO+丰度范围为0.4-7.3×10^-9；化学演化模型显示丰度可能相对恒定；估计产生发射的气体密度为5×10^4-5×10^5 cm^-3；在AV<6的区域，紫外辐射会降低两种分子的丰度。
AI.conclusion: HCN和HCO+发射确实来自致密气体；在足够高的消光区域，高强度紫外辐射对丰度影响有限；但在低消光区域，紫外辐射会通过破坏性反应降低分子丰度。

title: SPT-3G D1: A Measurement of Secondary Cosmic Microwave Background Anisotropy Power
summary: We report new measurements of millimeter-wave temperature power spectra in the angular multipole range $1700 \le \ell \le 11,000$ (wavelengths $13^\prime \gtrsim λ\gtrsim 2^\prime$). We use two years of data in three observing bands centered near 95, 150, and 220 GHz from the SPT-3G receiver on the South Pole Telescope that cover a 1646 deg$^2$ region of the Southern sky. Using the measured power spectra, we present constraints on the thermal and kinematic Sunyaev-Zel'dovich (SZ) effects, radio galaxies, and cosmic infrared background (CIB). We find that inferred SZ powers are dependent on the detailed modeling of the thermal SZ-CIB correlation, and to a lesser extent on the assumed angular dependence of the SZ spectra. We report constraints for simulation-based model templates as well as fits where the angular dependencies of the SZ and CIB power spectra are allowed to vary. In the latter case at $\ell=3000$, we find thermal SZ power at 143 GHz of $D_{3000}^{\rm tSZ} = 4.91\pm0.37\, μ{\rm K}^2$ and kinematic SZ power of $D_{3000}^{\rm kSZ} =1.75\pm0.86\, μ{\rm K}^2$. We use the measured kinematic SZ power to estimate the duration of reionization, noting that the reionization inferences are sensitive to the model choices and assumed level of homogeneous kinematic SZ power from the late-time universe. We find a 95% limit on the duration from an ionization fraction of 25% to 75% of $Δ^{50} z_{\rm re} <\,3.8$ based on a semi-analytic model, or a limit on the duration from an ionization fraction of 5% to 95% of $Δ^{90} z_{\rm re} <\,6.1$ based on the AMBER simulations.

AI.tldr: SPT-3G望远镜两年数据测量毫米波温度功率谱，约束SZ效应、射电星系和CIB，利用运动SZ功率估计再电离持续时间
AI.motivation: 通过测量高角多极矩范围的毫米波温度功率谱，更好地理解热SZ效应、运动SZ效应、射电星系和宇宙红外背景的物理特性，特别是SZ效应与CIB的相关性对功率谱推断的影响
AI.method: 使用SPT-3G接收器在南极望远镜收集两年数据，覆盖三个观测频段（95、150、220 GHz）和1646平方度的南天区域，测量角多极矩范围1700-11000的温度功率谱
AI.result: 在ℓ=3000处测得热SZ功率为4.91±0.37 μK²，运动SZ功率为1.75±0.86 μK²；SZ功率推断依赖于热SZ-CIB相关性的详细建模；基于运动SZ功率估计再电离持续时间，半解析模型给出Δ⁵⁰z_re < 3.8，AMBER模拟给出Δ⁹⁰z_re < 6.1
AI.conclusion: SPT-3G数据提供了对SZ效应和CIB的重要约束，运动SZ功率测量可用于限制宇宙再电离过程的时间尺度，但结果对模型选择和晚期宇宙均匀运动SZ功率水平的假设敏感

title: GLIMPSE-DDT spectroscopic properties of faint-end galaxies at $z\sim6$: Towards first metal enrichment, dust production, and ionizing photon production
comment: 19 pages, 5 figures, and 3 tables. Submitted to ApJ. Comments welcome
summary: Ultra-faint galaxies at high-$z$ are fundamental elements of the early galaxy assembly, and spectroscopic characterization of this population is essential to understand the earliest galaxy evolution. Leveraging the ultra-deep JWST/NIRCam and NIRSpec observations of a gravitational lensing field of Abell S1063, taken as part of the GLIMPSE survey, we present spectroscopic properties of 16 galaxies fainter than $M_{\rm UV}=-17$ mag, including the metallicity, dust attenuation, and the ionizing photon production efficiency. The emission lines are generally quite strong, roughly half of which cannot be replicated with standard stellar populations and require an extreme ionizing source. We also identify relatively strong [OIII] emission lines from all sample galaxies, which indicates that the low-mass end of the mass-metallicity relation is extended down to $M_\star\sim10^6\ M_\odot$ at $z\sim6$. The strong [OIII] line detection from the lowest-mass galaxy among the sample ($M_\star\sim10^{5.6}\ M_\odot$) stands in contrast to recent reports of extremely metal-poor galaxy candidates at similar mass and redshift, suggesting that there could be two distinct pathways of the earliest metal enrichment as simulations have predicted. Interestingly, we detect both dust attenuation and galactic outflow in one of the sample galaxies with $M_\star=10^{6.6}\ M_\odot$ at $z=5.5$. All the dust, metal, and outflow contents in this galaxy can be consistently explained by supernovae (SNe), indicative of the key roles of SNe in the earliest galaxy assembly such as dust production, metal enrichment, stellar feedback, and baryon cycle.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST观测数据，研究高红移超暗弱星系的光谱特性，包括金属丰度、尘埃衰减和电离光子产生效率，发现这些星系存在强发射线，表明早期星系演化存在两种不同的金属富集途径。
AI.motivation: 高红移超暗弱星系是早期星系组装的基本组成部分，对这些星系进行光谱表征对于理解最早的星系演化至关重要。通过研究这些星系的金属丰度、尘埃衰减和电离特性，可以揭示早期宇宙中星系形成和演化的关键过程。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRCam和NIRSpec对引力透镜场Abell S1063进行超深观测，作为GLIMPSE巡天的一部分。分析了16个比M_UV=-17星等更暗的星系的光谱特性，包括金属丰度、尘埃衰减和电离光子产生效率。
AI.result:
1. 发射线通常很强，约一半无法用标准恒星种群模拟，需要极端电离源
2. 所有样本星系都检测到相对较强的[OIII]发射线，表明质量-金属丰度关系的低质量端延伸到z~6时M_*~10^6 M_⊙
3. 最低质量星系(M_*~10^5.6 M_⊙)的强[OIII]线检测与近期报告的类似质量和红移的极贫金属星系候选体形成对比，表明可能存在两种不同的最早金属富集途径
4. 在z=5.5、M_*=10^6.6 M_⊙的星系中同时检测到尘埃衰减和星系外流，这些成分都可以用超新星一致解释
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了高红移超暗弱星系的光谱特性，表明早期星系演化存在多种金属富集途径。超新星在最早的星系组装中扮演关键角色，包括尘埃产生、金属富集、恒星反馈和重子循环等过程。这些发现对理解早期宇宙中星系形成和演化机制具有重要意义。

title: An X-ray-Emitting Proto-Cluster at $z\approx5.7$ Reveals Rapid Structure Growth
summary: Galaxy clusters are the most massive gravitationally bound structures in the universe and serve as tracers of the assembly of large-scale structure. Studying their progenitors, proto-clusters, sheds light on the earliest stages of cluster formation. Yet, detecting proto-clusters is demanding: their member galaxies are loosely bound and the emerging hot intracluster medium (ICM) may only be in the initial stages of virialization. Recent JWST observations located several proto-cluster candidates by identifying overdensities of $z\gtrsim5$ galaxies. However, none of these candidates was detected by X-ray observations, which offer a powerful way to unveil the hot ICM. Here, we report the combined Chandra and JWST detection of a proto-cluster, JADES-ID1, at $z\approx5.68$, merely one billion years after the Big Bang. We measure a bolometric X-ray luminosity of $L_{\rm bol} = (1.5^{+0.5}_{-0.6}) \times10^{44} \ \rm{erg \ s^{-1}}$ and infer a total gravitating mass of $M_{500}= (1.8^{+0.6}_{-0.7}) \times 10^{13} \ \rm{M_{\odot}}$, making this system a progenitor of today's most massive galaxy clusters. The detection of extended, shock-heated gas indicates that substantial ICM heating can occur in massive halos as early as $z\approx5.7$. In addition, given the limited survey volume, the discovery of such a massive cluster is statistically unlikely, implying that the formation of the large-scale structure must have occurred more rapidly in some regions of the early universe than standard cosmological models predict.

AI.tldr: JWST和钱德拉望远镜联合探测到红移z≈5.68的原始星系团JADES-ID1，这是目前发现的最早的星系团前身，质量为1.8×10¹³ M☉，X射线光度1.5×10⁴⁴ erg/s，表明星系团内介质加热在宇宙早期就已发生。
AI.motivation: 星系团是宇宙中最大质量的结构，研究其前身（原始星系团）有助于理解大尺度结构的早期形成。虽然JWST已发现多个高红移原始星系团候选体，但都缺乏X射线探测证据，而X射线是揭示热星系团内介质的关键手段。
AI.method: 结合钱德拉X射线望远镜和JWST的观测数据，探测红移z≈5.68的原始星系团JADES-ID1。通过X射线光度测量和引力质量推断，分析该系统的物理特性。
AI.result: 首次探测到红移z≈5.68的原始星系团，测得X射线光度L_bol = 1.5×10⁴⁴ erg/s，总引力质量M_500 = 1.8×10¹³ M☉。发现扩展的激波加热气体，表明星系团内介质加热在宇宙早期（z≈5.7）就已发生。
AI.conclusion: 这是目前发现的最早的星系团前身，将成为今天最大质量星系团的祖先。该发现表明大尺度结构在某些区域的早期宇宙中形成速度比标准宇宙学模型预测的更快，挑战了现有理论。

title: Bottom-heavy initial mass functions reveal hidden mass in early galaxies
comment: 29 pages, 7 figures, under peer review at Nature Astronomy
summary: JWST observations have revealed that massive galaxies formed and evolved far faster than predicted by galaxy formation models, with many having already assembled a large mass in stars $\sim12$ billion years ago [1-7]. However, masses of distant galaxies are highly uncertain, as they assume a distribution of stellar birth masses (the initial mass function [IMF]) similar to that in the Milky Way (MW). Specifically, the contribution from low-mass stars, which make up the bulk of stellar mass, is not directly observed, but inferred based on an extrapolation of the MW IMF. Here, we provide the first robust measurements of the IMF beyond the local Universe. Using ultra-deep spectra of nine massive, quiescent galaxies at $z\sim0.7$ from the ambitious JWST-IMFERNO program, extended to bluer wavelengths with deep spectra from LEGA-C [8], we find that these distant galaxies have excess low-mass stars. In other words, they have more bottom-heavy IMFs than the MW. For the oldest two galaxies, which are direct descendants of JWST's "impossibly early" galaxies, the bottom-heavy IMFs increase their stellar masses by a factor of $3-4$. These galaxies thus amplify the tension with galaxy formation models.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现遥远星系存在更多低质量恒星，导致其恒星质量比基于银河系初始质量函数估算的要高3-4倍，加剧了与星系形成模型的矛盾。
AI.motivation: JWST观测显示大质量星系形成演化速度远超模型预测，但遥远星系质量估算存在高度不确定性，因为传统方法假设其初始质量函数与银河系相似，而低质量恒星的贡献无法直接观测。
AI.method: 使用JWST-IMFERNO项目的超深光谱数据，结合LEGA-C的蓝光波段光谱，分析了9个红移约0.7的大质量静止星系，首次测量了银河系之外的初始质量函数。
AI.result: 发现这些遥远星系存在过多低质量恒星，具有比银河系更"底重"的初始质量函数。对于最古老的两个星系（JWST早期星系的直接后代），底重的初始质量函数使其恒星质量增加了3-4倍。
AI.conclusion: 遥远星系实际恒星质量比先前估算更高，进一步加剧了与星系形成模型的矛盾，表明大质量星系形成演化过程比现有模型预测的更快。

title: Euclid preparation. Galaxy power spectrum modelling in redshift space
summary: Accurate modelling of redshift-space distortions (RSD) is essential for maximizing the cosmological information extracted from large galaxy redshift surveys. In preparation for the forthcoming analysis of the Euclid spectroscopic data, we investigate three approaches to modelling RSD effects on the power spectrum multipoles of mock H$α$ emission line galaxies. We focus on two one-loop perturbation theory models -- the effective field theory (EFT) and velocity difference generator (${\rm VDG_ \infty}$) -- which differ in their treatment of the real-to-redshift space mapping on small scales, and a third approach, the BACCO emulator, which adopts a hybrid strategy combining perturbation theory with high-resolution N-body simulations. We assess the ability of these models to recover key cosmological parameters, including the expansion rate $h$, the cold dark matter density parameter $ω_{\rm c}$, and the scalar amplitude $A_{\rm s}$, across four redshift bins spanning $0.9 \leq z \leq 1.8$. In each bin, we find that ${\rm VDG_ \infty}$ and BACCO outperform the EFT model across all scales up to $k_{max} \lesssim 0.35 h\,Mpc^{-1} $. While BACCO saturates in constraining power at intermediate scales and higher redshift, the ${\rm VDG_ \infty}$ model continues to improve parameter constraints beyond $k_{max} \gtrsim 0.30 h\,Mpc^{-1}$. The EFT model, although robust on large scales, exhibits significant parameter biases for $k_{max} \gtrsim 0.25 h\,Mpc^{-1}$, limiting its applicability to Euclid-like H$α$ samples. Among the full perturbation theory-based models, the enhanced treatment of small-scale RSD effects in ${\rm VDG_ \infty}$ improves cosmological parameter constraints by up to a factor of two.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了三种红移空间畸变建模方法在Euclid巡天Hα发射线星系模拟数据上的表现，发现VDG∞模型和BACCO模拟器在kmax≲0.35 h Mpc⁻¹范围内优于EFT模型，其中VDG∞在小尺度上表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 为准备Euclid光谱数据的分析，需要准确建模红移空间畸变效应以最大化宇宙学信息提取。研究比较不同建模方法在模拟Hα发射线星系功率谱多极矩上的表现。
AI.method: 研究评估了三种红移空间畸变建模方法：1）有效场论（EFT）模型；2）速度差生成器（VDG∞）模型；3）BACCO模拟器（结合微扰论和高分辨率N体模拟的混合策略）。在0.9≤z≤1.8的四个红移区间内，测试这些模型恢复关键宇宙学参数（h、ωc、As）的能力。
AI.result: VDG∞和BACCO在所有尺度上（kmax≲0.35 h Mpc⁻¹）均优于EFT模型。BACCO在中间尺度和较高红移处达到饱和，而VDG∞在kmax≳0.30 h Mpc⁻¹时仍能改善参数约束。EFT模型在大尺度上稳健，但在kmax≳0.25 h Mpc⁻¹时出现显著参数偏差。在基于微扰论的模型中，VDG∞对小尺度RSD效应的增强处理使宇宙学参数约束改善了最多两倍。
AI.conclusion: VDG∞模型在红移空间畸变建模中表现最佳，特别是在小尺度上，对Euclid类Hα样本的宇宙学分析具有重要价值。EFT模型由于在小尺度上的参数偏差，在Euclid类样本中的应用受到限制。

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 euclid, dark matter 等主题/作者匹配。

title: Metallicity Structure in Galactic Longitude-Velocity Diagrams of the Milky Way Disk and FIRE-2 Simulations
comment: 32 pages, 17 figures. Accepted for publication by The Astrophysical Journal
summary: We investigate longitude-velocity ($\ell$-$v$) diagrams as a diagnostic tool to study the metallicity structure of the Milky Way (MW) disk. The present-day metallicity structure encodes the imprint of the Galaxy's formation, assembly, and secular evolution. Using oxygen abundances from HII regions across the MW disk, together with MW-mass galaxies from the Feedback in Realistic Environments (FIRE-2) cosmological simulations, we show that $\ell$-$v$ diagrams trace radial metallicity gradients and non-axisymmetric azimuthal metallicity variations. Because they do not rely on distance measurements, $\ell$-$v$ diagrams complement face-on maps for studying metallicity structure. In the MW, we detect the radial metallicity gradient in $\ell$-$v$ space, but current HII region oxygen abundance errors are too high to reveal azimuthal variations. In the FIRE-2 MW-mass galaxies, the radial gradient is evident in $\ell$-$v$ diagrams regardless of observer location, but anomalous gas kinematics can mimic azimuthal metallicity variations. We term these "anomalous motions", which have an excess local standard of rest (LSR) velocity tail 3 times larger in the FIRE-2 simulations compared to the MW. Our results highlight $\ell$-$v$ diagrams as a largely unexplored tool for probing metallicity structure without requiring distances, and underscore discrepancies between the gas kinematics in the FIRE-2 simulations and those in the MW.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了使用经度-速度图作为诊断工具来研究银河系盘金属丰度结构的方法，通过对比观测数据和模拟结果，发现这种不依赖距离测量的方法可以探测径向金属丰度梯度，但当前观测误差限制了探测方位角变化的能力。
AI.motivation: 研究银河系盘金属丰度结构对于理解星系形成、组装和长期演化过程至关重要。目前的研究方法通常依赖于距离测量，而经度-速度图提供了一种不依赖距离的替代方法，可以补充传统的正面观测图。
AI.method: 使用银河系盘中HII区域的氧丰度数据，结合FIRE-2宇宙学模拟中的银河系质量星系数据，分析经度-速度图如何追踪径向金属丰度梯度和非轴对称的方位角金属丰度变化。
AI.result: 在银河系中，经度-速度图可以检测到径向金属丰度梯度，但当前HII区域氧丰度误差过高，无法揭示方位角变化。在FIRE-2模拟的银河系质量星系中，径向梯度在经度-速度图中明显可见，但异常气体运动学可能模拟方位角金属丰度变化。
AI.conclusion: 经度-速度图是一种尚未充分探索的工具，可以在不需要距离测量的情况下探测金属丰度结构。研究还强调了FIRE-2模拟中的气体运动学与银河系实际观测之间的差异，特别是异常运动的局部标准静止参考系速度尾部分布在模拟中比观测大3倍。
